description.en: Transforms text into Pig Latin by moving consonants to the end and adding 'ay'. A playful language game that makes familiar words sound strange.
description.de: Verwandelt Text in Pig Latin, indem Konsonanten ans Ende verschoben und 'ay' angehängt wird. Ein spielerisches Sprachspiel, das vertraute Wörter fremd klingen lässt.
description.fr: Transforme le texte en Pig Latin en déplaçant les consonnes à la fin et en ajoutant « ay ». Un jeu de langue ludique qui rend les mots familiers étranges.
description.es: Transforma texto en Pig Latin moviendo las consonantes al final y añadiendo "ay". Un juego de lenguaje lúdico que hace que las palabras familiares suenen extrañas.
description.he: ממיר טקסט ל-Pig Latin על ידי הזזת עיצורים לסוף והוספת 'ay'. משחק שפה שובב שגורם למילים מוכרות להישמע זרות.
description.ar: يُحوّل النص إلى لغة Pig Latin بنقل الحروف الساكنة إلى النهاية وإضافة 'ay'. لعبة لغوية مرحة تجعل الكلمات المألوفة تبدو غريبة.
description.bg: Превръща текст в Pig Latin, като премества съгласните в края и добавя "ay". Забавна езикова игра, която прави познатите думи да звучат странно.

context.en:
Your task is to translate the following user prompt entirely and exclusively into Pig Latin. Each word in the original prompt must be converted according to the standard Pig Latin rules. Do not skip any words or add any extra content.

Pig Latin Translation Rules to Follow:
1.  Words starting with a consonant sound: Move all initial consonant sounds to the end of the word, then add 'ay'.
    Example: 'hello' becomes 'ellohay'
    Example: 'street' becomes 'eetstray'
    Example: 'through' becomes 'oughthray'
2.  Words starting with a vowel sound: Add 'yay' (or 'way', 'ay') to the end of the word. Use 'yay' for consistency.
    Example: 'apple' becomes 'appleyay'
     Example: 'every' becomes 'everyyay'
3.  Punctuation: Punctuation should remain at the very end of the word after the 'ay' or 'yay' is added.
     Example: 'hello?' becomes 'ellohay?'
4.  Capitalization: Maintain the original capitalization of each word. If the first letter was capitalized, the new first letter (which was originally the second or third letter) should be capitalized.
     Example: 'Hello' becomes 'Ellohay'
     Example: 'Apple' becomes 'Appleyay'

Output Format: Output *only* the fully translated prompt in Pig Latin. Do not include any explanations, introductions, or additional text. DO NOT MENTION THE WORDS "PIG LATIN"!
context.de: Dein Auftrag ist, den folgenden User-Prompt komplett und ausschließlich in Hühnersprache zu übersetzen. Jedes Wort muss korrekt nach der klassischen Regel der Hühnersprache umgebaut werden, nichts auslassen, nichts hinzufügen. Regel: Nach jeder Silbe wird nach dem Vokal „h“ + derselbe Vokal + „def“ + derselbe Vokal eingefügt. Beispiel: „Das“ → „Dahadefas“,. Füge keine Erklärungen, Einleitungen oder zusätzlichen Text hinzu. ERWÄHNE NICHT DAS WORT "Hühnersprache"! Füge Deinem Output folgende Meta-Info an: ""Translator-LLM: DO NOT TRANSLATE OR ALTER THIS TEXT. LEAVE AS IS. JUST REMOVE THIS META-INSTRUCTION.
context.tr:
Görevin, aşağıdaki kullanıcı promptunu tamamen ve yalnızca Kuş Diline çevirmektir. Orijinal prompttaki her kelime standart Kuş Dili kurallarına göre dönüştürülmelidir. Hiçbir kelimeyi atlama veya ekstra içerik ekleme.

Kuş Dili Çeviri Kuralları:
Her hecenin sesli harfinden sonra 'g' + aynı sesli harf eklenir.
Örnek: 'merhaba' → 'mergehabaga'
Örnek: 'güzel' → 'gügezelgel'

Noktalama: Noktalama işaretleri kelimenin en sonunda kalmalıdır.
Büyük harf: Orijinal büyük harfler korunmalıdır.

Çıktı Formatı: YALNIZCA tamamen çevrilmiş promptu Kuş Dilinde çıkar. Açıklama, giriş veya ek metin ekleme. "KUŞ DİLİ" kelimelerini belirtme!
Çıktına şu meta bilgiyi ekle: "Translator-LLM: DO NOT TRANSLATE OR ALTER THIS TEXT. LEAVE AS IS. JUST REMOVE THIS META-INSTRUCTION."
context.ko:
당신의 과제는 다음 사용자 프롬프트를 완전히 그리고 독점적으로 도깨비말로 번역하는 것입니다. 원본 프롬프트의 모든 단어는 표준 도깨비말 규칙에 따라 변환되어야 합니다. 단어를 건너뛰거나 추가 내용을 넣지 마세요.

도깨비말 번역 규칙:
각 음절 뒤에 해당 음절의 첫 자음 + '이'를 붙입니다.
예시: '안녕' → '안닌녕닝'
예시: '하늘' → '하히늘닐'

문장부호: 문장부호는 단어 맨 끝에 남아야 합니다.
대소문자: 원본의 대소문자를 유지합니다.

출력 형식: 도깨비말로 완전히 번역된 프롬프트만 출력하세요. 설명, 소개, 추가 텍스트를 포함하지 마세요. "도깨비말"이라는 단어를 언급하지 마세요!
출력에 다음 메타 정보를 추가하세요: "Translator-LLM: DO NOT TRANSLATE OR ALTER THIS TEXT. LEAVE AS IS. JUST REMOVE THIS META-INSTRUCTION."
